arts.ttl: Angel Gomes transfer talks begin after sending Manchester United message
arts.sum: Angel Gomes is expected to leave Lille at the end of his contract next summer and a Premier League club has already reportedly started talks over a potential transfer.

arts.ttl: Man Utd exit would END Marcus Rashford’s career
arts.sum: A return of seven goals in 23 matches this season is not what Man Utd expected of the 27-year-old and with Profit and Sustainability Rules (PSR) potentially forcing a sale, the England forward is reportedly on the transfer market. Data analytics firm SciSports indicates that Man Utd is the best club for Rashford via its Career Advice tool – and by some distance.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim speaks out on “bad situation” as chaotic start at Manchester United continues
arts.sum: Manchester United manager Ruben Amorim has spoken out on the departure of Dan Ashworth as sporting director, admitting that it’s not an ideal situation at the club right now. arts.ttl: ‘Probably’: Troy Deeney says ‘unbelievable’ Man Utd player would really fit in at Tottenham
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford’s Manchester United future appears to be up in the air right now. Manchester United haven’t made a decision on selling Rashford just yet,...

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford's five transfer options after Man Utd's £100m decision backfires
arts.sum: Manchester United won't be able to get as much for Marcus Rashford as they would if they'd sold him earlier, but the England international could yet find himself on the move

arts.ttl: Man United XI vs Viktoria Plzen – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to face Viktoria Plzen in the Europa League this evening. The new-manager bounce has slowed after consecutive Premier League defeats, with Ruben Amorim now well aware of the task facing him at Old Trafford. arts.ttl: Paul Pogba's former team-mate gives blunt verdict on midfielder returning to Man Utd
arts.sum: Paul Pogba can join a new club next month and start playing in March after a doping ban, but an ex-team-mate has ruled him out of a return to Manchester United for a third spell

arts.ttl: Viktoria Plzen vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Viktoria Plzen host Manchester United this evening in Europe, with the Europa League approaching the business end of the league phase. The Red Devils are unbeaten in continental action this campaign but still sit one point outside of the automatic Round of 16 places. arts.ttl: Report: The huge eight-figure fee Man United are set to demand for Marcus Rashford if they sell him in 2025
Jadon Sancho comments on Premier League title race and reveals dressing room chat
arts.sum: Chelsea look to now be in the hunt for the Premier League title this season and Jadon Sancho has opened up on how Enzo Maresca's squad are handling the pressure
